description.en: Starts the sending of messages queued on the port (only needed when usingEventTarget.addEventListener; it is implied when usingonmessage).

excerpt.es: Starts the sending of messages queued on the port (only needed when usingEventTarget.addEventListener; it is implied when usingonmessage).
